Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: A financial transaction record representing income or expense.

type.description: Whether it is income or expense.

userId.description: UID of the user who created this.

userName.description: Display name of the user who created this (transparent record).

userTitle.description: Position title of the user who created this transaction.

communityId.description: ID of the community this transaction belongs to (for sharing).

Community.title: Community
Community.description: A group representing an RT or organization for sharing data.

roles.description: Mapping of userId to their role (admin or viewer).

titles.description: Mapping of userId to their position title (e.g., Bendahara).

UserSettings.title: User Settings
UserSettings.description: User specific configurations like notification preferences and custom categories.

notificationsEnabled.description: Whether the user wants to receive notifications.

fcmToken.description: The FCM token for push notifications (optional).

communityId.description: Joined community ID for shared data.

transactions.description: Collection of all RT cash transactions.

communities.description: Collection of communities and their membership roles.
